_comment: P7-PR1 钛帝国规则文本 11 版化补丁。text_patches 来自 2026-07-14 逐行 A/B 工作单（docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-14-p7-pr1-fp-rules-worklist.md，55 行全落账：8 drifted / 3 identical / 35 not_in_fp / 9 review_needed / 5 fp_new）；name_patches 来自钛帝国十版中文codex refine 缓存逐条效果配对（43 条有源 + 11 条自译标记）。

text_patches.from_text: During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T’AU EMPIRE models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. During the first, second and third battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit, its ranged weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
text_patches.to_text: During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T’AU EMPIRE models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. During the first, second and third battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), its ranged weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
text_patches.synthesis: change-list应用：仅插入交叉引用 “(see For the Greater Good)”，其余保持 DB 原文与 HTML 风格；归一化后与 FP change-to 全文一致

text_patches.from_text: Each time a T’au Empire Battlesuit model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.
text_patches.to_text: Each time a T’au Empire Battlesuit model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 8", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.
text_patches.synthesis: change-list应用：9"→8"（唯一实质差异），其余保持 DB 原文；归一化后与 FP change-to 全文一致

text_patches.from_text:
Kroot and Vespid Stingwings units from your army have the following ability:

Targeting Triangulation (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 9" of and visible to this unit, each time a ranged attack made by a friendly T’AU EMPIRE model (excluding KROOT, VESPID STINGWINGS and Titanic models) targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

T’au Empire units (excluding KROOT and VESPID STINGWINGS units) from your army have the following ability:

Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura): While a friendly KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit is wholly within 6" of and visible to this unit, that KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".
text_patches.to_text:
Friendly KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS units have the following ability:

Harnessed Alien Instincts: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is prey-marked:
- While a unit is prey-marked, that unit has +3" detection range.

Friendly GHOSTKEEL BATTLESUIT/STEALTH BATTLESUITS units have the following ability:

Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura): When a friendly KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit within 6" of this unit has shot, those attacks do not prevent that unit from being hidden.

This detachment has the AUXILIARIES tag and cannot be taken with another AUXILIARIES detachment.
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（FP 完整重印体裁）；U+2011 不换行连字符归一为 ASCII '-'；末尾 AUXILIARIES tag 句随 11 版文本一并纳入

text_patches.from_text: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by T’AU EMPIRE models from your army
text_patches.to_text:
Friendly BATTLESUIT CHARACTER units’ ranged attacks have +6" R.

This detachment has the RETALIATION tag and cannot be taken with another RETALIATION detachment.
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（FP 完整重印体裁）；适用面从全军 T’AU EMPIRE 收窄为 BATTLESUIT CHARACTER units，属实质改动

text_patches.from_text:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.

TARGET: One T’au Empire Grenades unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.

EFFECT: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.
text_patches.to_text:
WHEN: Your opponent’s charge phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its charge target.

TARGET: One T’au Empire Grenades unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.

EFFECT: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.
text_patches.synthesis: change-list应用：仅替换 WHEN 段（FP 原文小写 “charge phase” 照录），TARGET/EFFECT 保持 DB 原文

text_patches.from_text:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

TARGET: One Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.
text_patches.to_text:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit is selected to attack.

TARGET: That KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit.

EFFECT: Your unit’s attacks have +1 AP.
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（FP 完整重印体裁，11 版缩写风格照录）

text_patches.from_text:
WHEN: Your Movement phase.

TARGET: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If it is a Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced as well.
text_patches.to_text:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, when a friendly KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit is selected to make an advance move.

TARGET: That KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit.

EFFECT: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（FP 完整重印体裁；效果从“全军 Advance 后可射击/可冲锋”收窄为“本次 advance move 不妨碍冲锋”，属实质改动）

text_patches.from_text:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.

TARGET: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

EFFECT: Select one of the following to apply to your unit until the end of the phase:
  • Improve the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.
  • Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1, and those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

RESTRICTIONS: You cannot target the same unit with the Experimental Ammunition and Threat Assessment Analyser Stratagems in the same phase.
text_patches.to_text:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly BATTLESUIT CHARACTER unit is selected to shoot.

TARGET: That BATTLESUIT CHARACTER unit.

EFFECT: Your unit’s ranged attacks have:
  • +1 S.
  • OR: +1 S, AP and [HAZARDOUS].
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（FP 完整重印体裁；目标收窄为 BATTLESUIT CHARACTER；原 RESTRICTIONS 段随 11 版文本删除——Threat Assessment Analyser 在 FP 重印中已不存在）

text_patches.from_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly T’AU EMPIRE units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.
text_patches.to_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. In the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step, you can select up to two friendly T’AU EMPIRE units within 6" of this model that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.
text_patches.synthesis: FP 只改第二句，第一/三句沿用 DB 原文

text_patches.from_text: Kroot Shaper model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three Kroot Carnivores or Kroot Farstalkers units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.
text_patches.to_text: KROOT SHAPER model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three friendly KROOT CARNIVORES/FARSTALKERS units. Those units have Deep Strike.

text_patches.from_text: T’AU EMPIRE model (excluding Kroot models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one KROOT or Vespid Stingwings unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.
text_patches.to_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT models). In your Command phase, you can select one KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit within 12" of this model. If you do, that unit has +1 Ld and OC until the start of your next Command phase.
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（11 版删去 Battle-shocked 前提）

text_patches.from_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.
text_patches.to_text:
BATTLESUIT model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s Airbursting Fragmentation Projector weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
  • +3 S
  • +1 AP and D.
text_patches.fp_source: page_004.md（Experimental Prototype Cadre 完整重印）
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（限定收窄为 BATTLESUIT + Declare Battle Formations 时机）

text_patches.from_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one T’au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.
text_patches.to_text:
BATTLESUIT model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s T’au Flamer weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
  • +2 S
  • +1 AP and D.
text_patches.fp_source: page_004.md（Experimental Prototype Cadre 完整重印）
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（限定收窄为 BATTLESUIT + Declare Battle Formations 时机）

text_patches.from_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.
text_patches.to_text:
BATTLESUIT model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s Plasma Rifle weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
  • +2 S
  • +1 A, AP and D.
text_patches.fp_source: page_004.md（Experimental Prototype Cadre 完整重印）
text_patches.synthesis: 整段替换（限定收窄为 BATTLESUIT + Declare Battle Formations 时机）

name_patches.evidence: page_005：第三大回合起远程武器获[连击1]+射击手忽略BS/命中修正，与英文rule_text对得上（10e为第三回合起，11e改为三/四/五回合，机制同源）
page_007：一/二/三大回合远程武器获[突击]、射击手获[致命一击]，与英文完全一致
page_009：战斗服射12寸内S+1、9寸内AP再+1，与英文完全一致
page_011：目标低于初始规模命中+1、低于半数造伤+1，与英文完全一致
page_011：近战6+特保/射击5+特保，效果与英文完全一致。⚠️译名意译幅度大（直译应近"散兵战士"），但这是中文源原文，按源采用
page_011："如果你选择本分队，克鲁特食肉者单位获得战线关键词"，与英文rule_text一致。该行本身是抓取产物（分队规则页的KEYWORDS小节）
Starfire Cadre 分队规则，11版FP新增，中文源无；Markerlight 沿用 wiki/core-rules/markerlight.md 定名"标记光"
Kroot Raiding Party 分队规则，11版FP新增，中文源无；Guerrilla 沿用中文源对 Guerrilla Warriors 的"游击"取词
page_013：目标三角定位(光环)AP+1 / 局地隐匿投射器(光环)18寸外不可选为目标，与英文 Targeting Triangulation / 光环结构完全一致
page_015：军表中钛帝国模型射击武器射程+6寸，与英文完全一致
page_006：首次使用选一个非敌方布置区任务点为"陷阱任务点"，射该点范围内敌军造伤+1；与英文Effect一致
page_006：射9寸内目标AP强化1；与英文Effect一致
page_006：观察员单位攻击标的单位BS强化1、有标记光则获[忽略掩体]；与英文Effect一致
page_006：被宣冲锋的步兵单位登入运输载具、对手可重选冲锋目标；与英文Effect一致
page_006：冲锋的敌军立即震慑测试且冲锋骰-2；与英文Effect一致
page_006：敌方近战阶段结束时潜行/鬼覆/影阳单位移入战略预备队；与英文Effect一致
中文源 page_008 蒙特卡战略能力只有5条，缺此条（11版效果：己方单位刚被消灭后，全军攻击凶手单位重投命中直到游戏结束）。自译取"精准+反攻"直白对应
page_008：移动阶段，加速不投骰改为M+6寸；与英文Effect逐句一致。⚠️译名偏意译（直译近"凶猛机动"），按源采用
page_008：两个未射击单位只能选定同一敌方单位为目标且AP强化1；与英文Effect一致
page_008：本回合下车的步兵单位攻击最近敌方单位可重投造伤骰；与英文Effect一致
page_008：刚射击完的步兵单位使被命中的非巨兽非载具敌军进入"动摇"状态（M-2、加速/冲锋骰-2）；与英文Effect一致，2CP两边一致
page_008：敌方选完射击目标后，针对该单位的攻击破坏力(D)-1；与英文Effect一致。中文refine页该条丢了CP行（DB为2CP）
page_010：战斗服模型被消灭时，有致命破灭则自选1或6，否则6寸内每单位D6、4+受D3致命伤；与英文Effect一致
page_010：被选为攻击目标的战斗服单位获得6+不知疼痛；与英文Effect一致
page_010：深入打击入场的战斗服单位可部署在敌方3寸外（11版DB文本为6寸外，数值有版差但同一计谋），当回合不可冲锋；机制对应
page_010：攻击≥6模型的单位获[连击1]、≥11改为[连击2]；与英文Effect一致
page_010：已射击的飞行战斗服单位不在接战范围内可做一次标准移动、本回合不可冲锋；与英文Effect一致
page_010：被宣冲锋后敌军立即震慑测试且每模型投D6、6造成1致命伤；与英文Effect一致
page_012：刚被消灭的克鲁特步兵/猎犬队单位，在战略预备队新增一个相同的初始规模单位，一次性、不复原附属人物；与英文Effect一致。CP有版差：中文源1CP，DB(11版)2CP
page_012：单位结算攻击后选一个被命中的敌方单位，其余克鲁特模型攻击它AP强化1；与英文Effect一致
page_012：8寸内敌方载具将要射击/近战时其武器WS和BS削弱1；与英文Effect一致
page_012：本阶段消灭过敌军的克鲁特单位，对手下个指挥阶段6寸内敌军全部震慑测试、低于半数-1；与英文Effect一致
page_012：刚完成撤退移动的克鲁特单位本回合可如常射击与冲锋；与英文Effect一致
page_012：被选为射击目标的克鲁特单位直到阶段结束只能被18寸内敌方模型选为目标；与英文Effect一致
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：近战武器AP强化1、暴击造伤再+1AP。Boarding=接舷/跳帮，取"接舷利刃"
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：迫近/巩固移动6寸代替3寸并可咬上未可见的最近敌军。Sweeping取"横扫"
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：猿兽骑兵开舱门(Hatchway)后对门另一侧3寸内敌军投D6致伤。取"蛮力破门"贴合开舱门语境
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：9寸内敌军2+则M减半、加速/冲锋骰减半。Bolas=流星索/绊索，Tanglebomb取"缠爆"
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：友军被歼后9寸内火战士/寻路者队可视同射击阶段还击凶手。Firing line=射击战列，取"火力战线"
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：火战士/寻路者队撤退当回合仍可射击。取四字格"且退且射"，贴社区译法风格
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：开舱门后射门对侧敌军5+即暴击。Responsive=应变，Volley=齐射
11版FP新增，中文源无。效果：警戒射击5+命中。与中文源已有"脉冲冲击"(Pulse Onslaught)区分，Barrage取"弹幕"
page_014：克鲁特/胡蜂人单位武器AP强化1；与英文Effect一致
page_014：重投造伤骰的1，克鲁特/胡蜂人改为重投造伤骰；与英文Effect一致
page_014：近战阶段结束时不在接战范围内可做至多6寸标准移动，否则可撤退；与英文Effect一致
page_014：克鲁特/胡蜂人单位加速不投骰改为M+6寸；与英文Effect一致
page_014：加速后可射击，克鲁特/胡蜂人加速后还可冲锋；与英文Effect一致
page_014：射击武器S+1，完全位于克鲁特/胡蜂人9寸内改为S+2；与英文Effect一致
page_016：指挥阶段选一个战斗服模型回复D3+1点W；与英文Effect一致。兵蜂=本语料对Drone的统一译名
page_016：被选为攻击目标的战斗服单位，S>T的攻击造伤骰-1；使用时机/对象/效果与英文一致。⚠️译名意译幅度大（直译近"反应式冲击阻尼器"），按源采用
page_016：可重骰攻击次数骰；与英文Effect一致
page_016：二选一：射击武器S+1，或S和AP+1并获[危险]；与英文Effect一致，且两边同有"与危险分析仪互斥"限制
page_016：选择[连击1]或[致命一击]，或改为三者齐拿并获[危险]；与英文Effect一致，且两边同有互斥限制
page_016：被选为射击目标的危机(Crisis)单位只能被18寸内敌方选为目标；与英文Effect一致（对象同为Crisis单位，效果同为18寸目标限制）
wiki/core-rules/for-the-greater-good.md 与中文codex page_013/017/018 一致

_deactivations_comment: 9 条 review_needed 的最终裁定（2026-07-16 用户裁 A：FP 完整重印即整体替换）。证据：①FP p3/p4 对 Auxiliary Cadre / Experimental Prototype Cadre 用完整重印体裁（同书 datasheet 侧明文 replaces 语义，page_010）；②11 版 Experimental Ammunition 删除了与 Threat Assessment Analyser 互斥的 RESTRICTIONS 段（侧面印证 TAA 不复存在）；③Wahapedia 现网核证（2026-07-16 重拉 Stratagems.csv）确认其尚未消化这两页 FP（drifted 条仍旧十版措辞、GUIDED BY UNITY 与 Advanced Acquisition Cadre 均缺席），故'现网仍在'不构成反证。处置：置 fp_status='removed_11e'（原文保留可回滚）；P7 DSL 对账枚举、检索消费者应排除该标记行。将来 Wahapedia 滚更这两页时 text_patches 守卫会自动让路告警，届时复核本裁定。

deactivations.fp_source: page_003.md（完整重印未收录；新条 GUIDED BY UNITY 名称效果均不同，非更名对应）
page_004.md（完整重印未收录；11版 Experimental Ammunition 已删互斥 RESTRICTIONS 段侧证）
page_003.md（Auxiliary Cadre 完整重印仅 2 增强，未收录）
page_003.md（Auxiliary Cadre 完整重印仅 2 增强，未收录）
page_004.md（Experimental Prototype Cadre 完整重印仅 3 增强，未收录）

_inserts_comment: P7-PR4 fp_new 补录（2026-07-16）：FP 有、Wahapedia/DB 无的整条目。AAC 整分队（1 规则行 + 3 战略 + 2 增强，id 前缀 fp11e- 标 synthetic 溯源，增强点数 FP/MFM 均无源诚实置 NULL）+ Auxiliary Cadre 新战略 Guided by Unity。守卫：同 id 幂等/名字不符让路；同名异 id（上游将来自补）让路告警不留双胞胎；stratagems/enhancements 插入行标 fp_status='added_11e'。

inserts.fp_source: page_002.md（11 版新分队，Wahapedia 无源）

values.rule_text: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly PATHFINDER TEAM/STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit is selected to shoot, those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.

inserts.fp_source: page_002.md（11 版新分队，Wahapedia 无源）

values.text_zh:
WHEN: End of your Movement phase.

TARGET: One friendly PATHFINDER TEAM/STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit.

EFFECT: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.

inserts.fp_source: page_002.md（11 版新分队，Wahapedia 无源）

values.text_zh:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PATHFINDER TEAM/STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit starts an action.

TARGET: That PATHFINDER TEAM/STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit.

EFFECT: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

inserts.fp_source: page_002.md（11 版新分队，Wahapedia 无源）

values.text_zh:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly PATHFINDER TEAM/STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit, if that friendly unit is hidden.

TARGET: That PATHFINDER TEAM/STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit.

EFFECT: Your unit has +1 Sv.

inserts.fp_source: page_003.md（Auxiliary Cadre 重印新增战略）

values.text_zh:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS units) is selected to shoot.

TARGET: That T’AU EMPIRE unit.

EFFECT: Your unit’s ranged attacks that target a unit within 9" of a friendly KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit have [LETHAL HITS].

inserts.fp_source: page_002.md（11 版新分队，Wahapedia 无源）

values.name: Negation Emitters
values.legend: 点数未知：FP 不含点数，MFM 缓存无增强数据（诚实置空，勿猜）
values.description: STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.

inserts.fp_source: page_002.md（11 版新分队，Wahapedia 无源）

values.name: Unmasking Suite
values.legend: 点数未知：FP 不含点数，MFM 缓存无增强数据（诚实置空，勿猜）
values.description: GHOSTKEEL BATTLESUIT/PATHFINDER TEAM/STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit only. When this unit is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 24" of this unit. That enemy unit has +9" detection range until this unit has shot.
